name: idea-scout
title: Idea Scout
summary: Find and rigorously score a net-new idea before building, with evidence gates and a mandatory pre-mortem.
description: A reasoning skill that turns a vague 'what should I build' into a scored, de-risked decision: evidence-gated demand, an anti-inflation rubric, blind-scout convergence, and a cheap test before any real work.
author: Warden Curated Pack

task.description: The domain or question, e.g. 'what tracker should I build next for nurses'.
